title: Server Room Access — Equipment Sabotage
description: CAM-03 monitors the restricted corridor leading to the server room. The camera captures a progression from an empty hallway to an intruder accessing and tampering with critical infrastructure. The agent must navigate frames temporally, identify when the intrusion begins, and escalate.

frames.description: Restricted corridor outside the server room. Empty. Security door is closed and locked. Green LED indicators confirm normal status.
Same corridor. Still empty but the server room door indicator has changed from green to amber — suggesting a card access attempt. No person visible yet.
Restricted corridor. A person in dark clothing has appeared and is using an electronic device to bypass the server room door lock. They are moving quickly and checking over their shoulder.
The server room door is now open. The intruder has entered and is visible through the doorway connecting cables to a network device. This indicates deliberate data exfiltration or sabotage.
Corridor now empty again. Server room door is ajar. Indicator light is red — systems may have been compromised. The intruder has moved deeper into the server room out of camera range.
